articles.author: Alana Wise
articles.title: Trump vows to 'take care of Cuba,' praises Venezuela cooperation at summit - NPR
articles.description: Trump made the promise in front of an assembled meeting of Latin American leaders.
articles.content: President Trump on Saturday launched the Shield of the Americas Summit a coalition of Latin American leaders with a pledge to "take care of Cuba," as the United States increases its intervention in t… [+2001 chars]
